disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus latest updates: WHO says outbreak is stabilizing as the Netherlands reports new case and ship captain disembarks - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Hantavirus latest updates: WHO says outbreak is stabilizing as the Netherlands reports new case and ship captain disembarks Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: WHO称汉坦疫情趋稳，荷兰报告新病例，船长下船。

updates.title_en: Gates Foundation commits $15 million to support Ebola response in DRC , Uganda
updates.summary_zh: 盖茨基金会拨款1500万美元支持刚果和乌干达埃博拉应对。

updates.title_en: Measles kills more than 500 children in Bangladesh : NPR
updates.summary_zh: 孟加拉国麻疹疫情导致500多名儿童死亡。

updates.title_en: Navy sends doctors to treat rat virus patient on remote island - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Navy sends doctors to treat rat virus patient on remote island The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 海军派医生前往偏远岛屿治疗鼠病毒患者。
